top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'hydrogen' 
  AND m.label = 'carcinogenic';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'H' 
  AND m.label = 'carcinogenic';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'hydrogen' 
  AND m.label = 'carcinogenic';

WITH hydrogens AS (
  SELECT a.molecule_id
  FROM atom a
  JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
  WHERE a.element = 'hydrogen' AND m.label = 'carcinogenic'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom
WHERE molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM hydrogens);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m USING(molecule_id)
WHERE a.element = 'H' 
  AND m.label = 'carcinogenic';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'hydrogen' 
  AND m.label = 'carcinogenic';

WITH hydrogens AS (
  SELECT a.molecule_id
  FROM atom a
  JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
  WHERE a.element = 'hydrogen' AND m.label = 'carcinogenic'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom
WHERE molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM hydrogens);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m USING(molecule_id)
WHERE a.element = 'H' 
  AND m.label = 'carcinogenic';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'hydrogen' 
  AND m.label = 'carcinogenic';
